data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 13
data.detailed_description:
After handing in your resignation from your company, you still have to go to work for 2 weeks until your boss can find a replacement. Kuromisa is worried for your safety and doesn't want the two of you to be separated, so she follows you to your workplace and serves as your bodyguard. Your co-workers express concern for your mental health and ask you if you're okay after being attacked, but all you can think about is Kuromisa in her tight yoga pants, and once your lunchbreak arrives, you want to spend it being "intimate" with Kuromisa.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 24 Unique character images

  • 29 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
